title: Cloudflare DNS Record
description: A DNS record object from the Cloudflare API, representing a single DNS record entry within a zone. Supports all standard record types including A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, and more.

id.description: The unique identifier of the DNS record.

zone_id.description: The zone identifier this record belongs to.

zone_name.description: The domain name of the zone.

name.description: The DNS record name (fully qualified domain name).

content.description: The value of the DNS record. Content format depends on the record type.

ttl.description: Time to live in seconds. A value of 1 indicates automatic TTL managed by Cloudflare.

priority.description: Record priority, required for MX, SRV, and URI record types.

proxied.description: Whether the record is receiving the performance and security benefits of Cloudflare's proxy.

proxiable.description: Whether the record can be proxied through Cloudflare.

locked.description: Whether the record is locked and cannot be modified.

comment.description: A comment about the DNS record for documentation purposes.

tags.description: Custom tags for categorizing and filtering DNS records.

data.description: Structured data for record types that require additional fields (SRV, CAA, SSHFP, etc.).

meta.description: Extra Cloudflare-specific metadata about the record.

auto_added.description: Whether the record was auto-added by Cloudflare.

managed_by_apps.description: Whether the record is managed by a Cloudflare app.

managed_by_argo_tunnel.description: Whether the record is managed by a Cloudflare Tunnel.

source.description: The source of the DNS record.

modified_on.description: When the record was last modified.
